underlying_goal: Build a macOS Bauhaus-style clock screensaver matching bauhausclock.com design with specific visual requirements
friction_detail: Clock was implemented with Roman numerals instead of Arabic numerals with external minute markers, not matching the original Bauhaus design references.
brief_summary: User continued building a Bauhaus clock macOS app across multiple tasks, but the final result had incorrect number styling (Roman instead of Arabic) requiring further fixes in a new session.
